EOW Bhopal — First Time Setup

Enter Supabase credentials. Get from Supabase → Settings → API.

Should look like: https://abcd1234.supabase.co (NO trailing slash)
The "anon public" key (long string starting with eyJ)

🏷 Tags

Tags manage karein — enquiries, courts, MOT tasks, DG directives, discussion notes में लागू किए गए सभी tags यहाँ से control होते हैं।
🏷 Tag Management
Add Tag
Max 40 characters. Use short, descriptive names.
Preview
⚠ System tag — name और auto-link behavior change करने से कई जगह असर पड़ सकता है (जैसे "Discussion" tag DG EOW box में dikhata hai, "My Tasks" tag MOT box में autolink karta hai)। केवल color बदलना safe है।

📊 Reports

Filter karen aur PDF generate karen \u2014 essentials only
⚡ Quick Presets:
Step 1 — Type Selection
Step 2 — Date Range
Step 3 — Status Filter (Optional)
कोई भी ☐ select न करें = सभी statuses include होंगे
Step 4 — Officer Filter (Optional)
कोई भी officer select न करें = सभी officers include होंगे

🔗 Links — Quick Copy

Forms aur shareable links \u2014 IOs aur staff ke liye प्रगति प्रतिवेदन, अवकाश आवेदन, ya kisi bhi future link ko yahan se copy/share karen
📋
प्रगति प्रतिवेदन
Case progress submit करने के लिए
क्या उपयोग: IO इस link पर जाकर अपने case की progress, action taken, और latest status submit करता है। हर update आपके dashboard में Pragati Prativedan tab में दिखेगा।
🏖
अवकाश आवेदन
Leave application form
क्या उपयोग: Officer/Staff इस link पर जाकर अपनी leave application submit करता है। हर application आपके dashboard में Leaves tab में pending approval के लिए दिखेगी।
📜
नोटिस तामील
Notice/Summons/Warrant तामील form
क्या उपयोग: तामील staff (SI/ASI/HC/Const) इस link पर अपने PIN से login कर अपने assigned notices देखता है, तामील/अदम-तामील mark करता है, और GPS location tag करता है। हर update आपके dashboard में Notice-Summons-Warrants section में दिखेगा।
🕐
उपस्थिति / Attendance
Office check-in / check-out form
क्या उपयोग: समस्त establishment इस link पर अपने PIN से login कर कार्यालय आगमन (Check-In) एवं प्रस्थान (Check-Out) दर्ज करता है। GPS location अनिवार्य। पहली बार = आगमन, दूसरी बार = प्रस्थान (smart auto-detect)। हर entry आपके dashboard के 🕐 Attendance box में दिखेगी।
📁 SELECT
Choose Case Type

📚 Quick Reference
❓ Help & Tips
👋 Welcome to EOW Bhopal Dashboard
यहाँ office के सब records (Complaints, RC, PE, Court Cases, Pragati, Establishment etc.) ek hi jagah maintain hote hain.

🎯 Aap KYA Kar Sakte Hain

  • ✅ Sab tabs me data dekh sakte hain
  • ✅ Nayi entries (Complaint/RC/PE/Court Case etc) add kar sakte hain
  • ✅ Existing entries edit kar sakte hain
  • ✅ Reports / PDF generate kar sakte hain
  • ✅ Search aur filters use kar sakte hain

🚫 Yeh sirf SP saab ke liye hai

  • ✗ Delete koi bhi entry
  • ✗ Avkash applications Approve/Reject
  • ✗ Courts Master Manage
  • ✗ Password reset
💡 Pro Tip:
Agar button nahi dikh raha, woh aapke role me available nahi hai. Normal hai, tension na lo.
🏠 Home
Quick overview — daily start point
📊 Total Cases
Sab cases ek jagah
📝 Complaints
Sab complaints
📋 R-Complaints
Repeat / regular complaints
🔍 RCs / PEs / STRs
Registered Cases, Preliminary Enquiries, STRs
🕵 Sutra Suchna
Source intelligence
⚖ Court Cases
Supreme/HC/District tracking. Source Enquiry zaroor link karen
📋 प्रगति प्रतिवेदन
IO updates / progress
📊 IO Review
IO performance
👥 Establishment
Office staff list
🏖 Leaves
Avkash applications. Sirf SP approve karen
📊 Reports
Multi-filter + PDF export
🔗 Links
Shareable form URLs
1. Nayi Complaint Add Karna
Complaints tab → "+ Add" → form fill → Save
2. Court Case Add Karna
Court Cases → "+ Add" → Court choose → Source Enquiry zaroor link karen → Save
3. Specific Case Search
Tab kholen → search bar me keyword (No, name, IO) type karen
4. Year-wise Filter
Tab me year sub-tabs (2024, 2025) par tap karen
5. Report Generate Karna
Reports tab → Quick Preset YA manual filters → 🔍 Preview → 📄 Export PDF
6. File Attach Karna
Case open karen → Attachments section → "+ Add File" → PDF/Image select
7. Linked Enquiry Dekhna
Court Cases me "Related" column → golden badge (C-15/24 →) → tap → linked enquiry detail
8. Pragati History
Pragati Prativedan tab → "📊 Case Timeline" button → chronological history
Problem Solution
Login fail ho rahaPassword sahi type karen, internet check karen, sahi dropdown choose
Page load nahi ho rahaRefresh (Ctrl+R / Cmd+R), internet check, alag browser try
Save kaam nahi kar rahaRequired fields (*) sab bhare hain check, refresh, retry
Hindi text galat dikh rahaChrome / Safari use karen (latest version)
Search me result nahiPartial keyword try, spelling check
"Duplicate" errorSame No+Year combo exists. Verify ya different number
PDF generate nahi ho rahaBrowser settings me popup blocker disable karen
Account locked (5 wrong)10 min wait OR SP saab se reset karwaen
🔐 Security Golden Rules:
  • Apna password KISI ke saath share NA karen
  • Public/shared computer pe logout zaroor karen
  • 5 wrong attempts → 10 min lock automatic
  • Password leak ka shaq → turant SP saab ko bataen
  • Login URL public WhatsApp groups me NA share karen
📱 Mobile Use ke liye:
  • Sirf apne personal phone par use karen
  • Public WiFi se sensitive data avoid karen
  • Screenshot share karte time PII (names, contact) hide karen
  • "Save Password" browser feature shared device pe USE NA karen
✅ Logout Karna Bhool Gaye:
Top right me apna naam ke saath "Logout" button hai. Office se nikalte time, ya dusra koi computer use karne se pehle — zaroor logout karen.
💡 Detailed PDF guide SP saab ne WhatsApp pe bheja hai

New Member
Establishment
+
Click to upload photo (optional)
यह PIN staff को दें — इससे वह notice-tameel-form में login कर अपने assigned notices देखेगा। खाली छोड़ें यदि यह staff तामील नहीं करता।
Live Calendar Sync
📆 Subscribe — Apple Calendar / Google
📲
Subscribe karen → sabhi directives ki deadlines apke Apple Calendar / Google Calendar me automatically appear hongi. Naye directives bhi auto-sync ho jaayenge. Smart reminders 1 din pehle + uss din 9 AM milenge.
📱 iPhone / iPad (Apple Calendar)
  1. Settings → Calendar → Accounts
  2. Add Account → Other → Add Subscribed Calendar
  3. Server me yeh URL paste karen:
  1. Next → Save — done!
🚀 Direct subscribe (iPhone par tap karen)
💻 Mac (Calendar.app)
  1. Calendar app → File → New Calendar Subscription
  2. Yeh URL paste karen:
  1. Location: iCloud (sab devices par sync)
  2. Auto-refresh: Every 15 minutes
🌐 Google Calendar
  1. Google Calendar → Other calendars → + → From URL
  2. Upar wala HTTPS URL paste karen
  3. ⚠ Google calendar 12-24 ghante me refresh karta hai (slow)
⚠ Yeh feature kaam karne ke liye Edge Function deploy hona zaroori hai. Deployment guide: PHASE2-Calendar-Setup-Guide.md
